india_trends.title: Tata Power sets board meeting date to declare Q4 results 2026. Details here
india_trends.summary: Tata Power Q4 update: The Tata group company has fixed 12 May 2026 as the board meeting date to consider Q4 results and dividend. Brokerages expect a double-digit fall in profit and sales for January-March quarter.

india_trends.title: SBI Life Q4 Results: Net profit slips 1% YoY to ₹804 crore; premium income up 16%
india_trends.summary: SBI Life Insurance reported a 1% decline in net profit for Q4 FY26, totaling ₹804 crore, down from ₹814 crore last year. Net premium income increased by 16% year-on-year to ₹27,684 crore.
